mapper.insert:
select SEQ_NOTICE.nextval from dual
insert into notice( NOTICE_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT, NOTICE_WRITER, NOTICE_DATE )values( #{noticeNo}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, #{noticeWriter}, sysdate )
mapper.update: update notice set notice_hit = notice_hit + 1 where notice_no = #{noticeNo}
update notice set notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, notice_date = sysdate where notice_no = #{noticeNo}
